lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਤਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੪ ਦੁਪਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: jaitasaree mahalaa 5 ghar 4 dupade |
lines.english: Jaitsree, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House, Dho-Padhay:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਮੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਗੁਰ ਆਗੵਿ ॥
lines.translit: ab mai sukh paaeo gur aagay |
lines.english: Now, I have found peace, bowing before the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜੀ ਸਿਆਨਪ ਚਿੰਤ ਵਿਸਾਰੀ ਅਹੰ ਛੋਡਿਓ ਹੈ ਤਿਆਗੵਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tajee siaanap chint visaaree ahan chhoddio hai tiaagay |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I have abandoned cleverness, quieted my anxiety, and renounced my egotism. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਟਹਲ ਹਰਿ ਲਾਇਓ ਤਉ ਜਮਿ ਛੋਡੀ ਮੋਰੀ ਲਾਗਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa ttehal har laaeo tau jam chhoddee moree laag |1|
lines.english: In His Grace, the Guru engaged me in the Lord's service, and then, the Messenger of Death gave up pursuing me. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਉ ਦੇਖਉ ਤਉ ਸਗਲ ਮੋਹਿ ਮੋਹੀਅਉ ਤਉ ਸਰਨਿ ਪਰਿਓ ਗੁਰ ਭਾਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: jau dekhau tau sagal mohi moheeo tau saran pario gur bhaag |
lines.english: When I looked, I saw that everyone was enticed by emotional attachment; then, I hurried to the Guru's Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਰਿਓ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਪਾਵਕ ਕੋ ਜਉ ਸੰਤ ਭੇਟੇ ਵਡ ਭਾਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: tario saagar paavak ko jau sant bhette vadd bhaag |
lines.english: I swam across the ocean of fire, when I met the Saints, through great good fortune.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਏ ਮੋਰੋ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਨੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਗਿ ॥੨॥੧॥੫॥
lines.translit: jan naanak sarab sukh paae moro har charanee chit laag |2|1|5|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, I have found total peace; my consciousness is attached to the Lord's feet. ||2||1||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਧਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: man meh satigur dhiaan dharaa |
lines.english: Within my mind, I cherish and meditate on the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਤਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: jaitasaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Jaitsree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲ ਜਾਲ ਅਰੁ ਮਹਾ ਜੰਜਾਲਾ ਛੁਟਕੇ ਜਮਹਿ ਡਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaal jaal ar mahaa janjaalaa chhuttake jameh ddaraa |
lines.english: Death's noose and its mighty entanglements have vanished, along with the fear of death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦ੍ਰਿੜੑਿਓ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜੀਉ ਮਇਆ ਕਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: drirraio giaan mantru har naamaa prabh jeeo meaa karaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He has implanted within me spiritual wisdom and the Mantra of the Lord's Name; Dear God has shown mercy to me. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇਓ ਦੁਖ ਹਰਣ ਸਰਣ ਕਰੁਣਾਪਤਿ ਗਹਿਓ ਚਰਣ ਆਸਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aaeo dukh haran saran karunaapat gahio charan aasaraa |1|
lines.english: I have come to the Sanctuary of the Merciful Lord, the Destroyer of pain; I am holding tight to the Support of His feet. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਵ ਰੂਪ ਭਇਓ ਸਾਧਸੰਗੁ ਭਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: naav roop bheo saadhasang bhav nidh paar paraa |
lines.english: The Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, has assumed the form of a boat, to cross over the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਿਉ ਪੀਓ ਗਤੁ ਥੀਓ ਭਰਮਾ ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਅਜਰੁ ਜਰਾ ॥੨॥੨॥੬॥
lines.translit: apiau peeo gat theeo bharamaa kahu naanak ajar jaraa |2|2|6|
lines.english: I drink in the Ambrosial Nectar, and my doubts are shattered; says Nanak, I can bear the unbearable. ||2||2||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਖ ਸਹਜ ਆਨੰਦ ਸਗਲ ਸਿਉ ਵਾ ਕਉ ਬਿਆਧਿ ਨ ਕਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sookh sehaj aanand sagal siau vaa kau biaadh na kaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: is blessed with all peace, poise and bliss; no afflictions cling to him. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਭਏ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਸਹਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau bhe govind sahaaee |
lines.english: One who has the Lord of the Universe as his help and support

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਤਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: jaitasaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Jaitsree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਸਹਿ ਸਭ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਹਹਿ ਅਲੇਪਾ ਨਹ ਵਿਆਪੈ ਉਨ ਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: deeseh sabh sang raheh alepaa neh viaapai un maaee |
lines.english: He appears to keep company with everyone, but he remains detached, and Maya does not cling to him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਤਤ ਕੇ ਬੇਤੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਬੁਧਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ekai rang tat ke bete satigur te budh paaee |1|
lines.english: He is absorbed in love of the One Lord; he understands the essence of reality, and he is blessed with wisdom by the True Guru. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਿਸਤਰੀਐ ਜਿਨ ਰਸਿ ਰਸਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਈ ॥੨॥੩॥੭॥
lines.translit: tin kai sang naanak nisatareeai jin ras ras har gun gaaee |2|3|7|
lines.english: Associating with them, Nanak is saved; with love and exuberant joy, they sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||2||3||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆ ਮਇਆ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਈ ਸੰਤ ਸੁਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: deaa meaa kirapaa tthaakur kee seee sant subhaaee |
lines.english: Those whom the Lord and Master blesses with His kindness, compassion and mercy are the sublime and sanctified Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਤਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: jaitasaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Jaitsree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਿਆਨ ਮੋਹ ਮਗਨ ਮਹਾ ਪ੍ਰਾਨੀ ਅੰਧਿਆਰੇ ਮਹਿ ਦੀਪ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: agiaan moh magan mahaa praanee andhiaare meh deep |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The ignorant are totally intoxicated with emotional attachment; in this darkness, the Lord is the only lamp. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਜੀਵਨ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਧਨ ਰੂਪ ॥
lines.translit: gobind jeevan praan dhan roop |
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe is my existence, my breath of life, wealth and beauty.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਤੁਮਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਆਨੂਪ ॥
lines.translit: safal darasan tumaraa prabh preetam charan kamal aanoop |
lines.english: Fruitful is the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan, O Beloved God; Your lotus feet are incomparably beautiful!

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਬਾਰ ਕਰਉ ਤਿਹ ਬੰਦਨ ਮਨਹਿ ਚਰ੍ਹਾਵਉ ਧੂਪ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anik baar krau tih bandan maneh charhaavau dhoop |1|
lines.english: So many times, I bow in reverence to Him, offering my mind as incense to Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਰਿ ਪਰਿਓ ਤੁਮੑਰੈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦੁਆਰੈ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੑੁ ਕਰਿ ਗਹੀ ਤੁਮੑਾਰੀ ਲੂਕ ॥
lines.translit: haar pario tumarai prabh duaarai drirrau kar gahee tumaaree look |
lines.english: Exhausted, I have fallen at Your Door, O God; I am holding tight to Your Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਢਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਕਉ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਪਾਵਕ ਕੇ ਕੂਪ ॥੨॥੪॥੮॥
lines.translit: kaadt lehu naanak apune kau sansaar paavak ke koop |2|4|8|
lines.english: Please, lift Your humble servant Nanak up, out of the pit of fire of the world. ||2||4||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਤਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: jaitasaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Jaitsree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਈ ਜਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਦੇਵੈ ਜੋਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: koee jan har siau devai jor |
lines.english: If only someone would unite me with the Lord!

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਗਹਉ ਬਕਉ ਸੁਭ ਰਸਨਾ ਦੀਜਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਅਕੋਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: charan ghau bkau subh rasanaa deejeh praan akor |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I hold tight to His feet, and utter sweet words with my tongue; I make my breath of life an offering to Him. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਕਰਤ ਕਿਆਰੋ ਹਰਿ ਸਿੰਚੈ ਸੁਧਾ ਸੰਜੋਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: man tan niramal karat kiaaro har sinchai sudhaa sanjor |
lines.english: I make my mind and body into pure little gardens, and irrigate them with the sublime essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਆ ਰਸ ਮਹਿ ਮਗਨੁ ਹੋਤ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਮਹਾ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਤੇ ਤੋਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: eaa ras meh magan hot kirapaa te mahaa bikhiaa te tor |1|
lines.english: I am drenched with this sublime essence by His Grace, and the powerful hold of Maya's corruption has been broken. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇਓ ਸਰਣਿ ਦੀਨ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨ ਚਿਤਵਉ ਤੁਮੑਰੀ ਓਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: aaeo saran deen dukh bhanjan chitvau tumaree or |
lines.english: I have come to Your Sanctuary, O Destroyer of the suffering of the innocent; I keep my consciousness focused on You.
